subject: re: International Women’s Day

body:
Today is International Women’s Day and it’s important that we highlight just what’s at stake in our election. The difference between Wilmot Collins an | | | [](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=e9da52d2b01f4664b99347f7160b4b14&_e=Vs1cbfa0sEKZwtDleo9ibVlAZkyEpEZtA4_4bW4GQseCV0EMvS5u0CtbnS5MQNVWwLlv1Xb1uLErC1HnFnAcIglqARiSmDOQWu-DIUcPQvHRXbDfyub3NlLZuwTJqIVRa8Zb4t4hk48Gk2jiUXB713EZ3ReWDqS96xU-IaK2igpde0Q0tuudoZ1jIinirEd-iFBnSLPNmg66NguOqlUI-ynk35H5ZIcTrB84Wbpc9t2RgdJoQMIlajjxWgIjxffJ7eOMbgiWeW1qNfbCnp_ftY2vtaTdQSHM9_lTzrmJXRhQ1iw9oQv7QQWI5EB7ud_RUoeydbF3wOlpLzVEvVGY2EGm03wiYq75FUyu2q4W1DG6QL7UQASqz3rtrA631IZ_6bWq9sIzt5TmBVcl74AEUuKoM3b7t6aahU_YP4m9eEvEmgB7UyZqAtiRvaYw2e19zB4ImkRRcHYWSninSO4YxH_A4xVi-Joekr9e2KnAUDw%3D) Today is International Women’s Day and it’s important that we highlight just what’s at stake in our election. The difference between Wilmot Collins and Steve Daines couldn’t be starker when it comes to standing up for women’s rights: [](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=e9da52d2b01f4664b99347f7160b4b14&_e=amwlMvBDreTCGdxrrcYRfeMrxcyd2icHBZoa9lzIEZB9aB9ZFLGymYLECtP8VVkyupHPsTaCRqBVAZI4rVxJujMfpTTFXFJqFyxJ1Gr-INse3ZGTR8MBboqeJzm-wPetL1PZel1rgm-ZMeBcocs5CpURTqDa3kRjuYYBH6aBxd3JqWF7mmL8sDU07dZwqSVex9ASoA2fcQ7grOGRNEJhlQaai_qTsb5Bp6TXTD31vNqpCXq9hNMDvxfk2asK1WOZ4MUkzzQ0c5Tq1XQ_eFjTR7kbn60XnGX6EDjBNsxBgmKG6PijPYLnhjC-LLbGq8264qEhAkOInJpzpRa-aDovX3y8WtGeUr_1_fLLEHoZMaVwHTdgWCgfYCRoKYIIhF6byMGACtvQCqYBiI2h8o3CxuLYgee5URDu0yKHFeMgYv-n8PHXhBZ3gNIfXe1M1wREjASVODHHZzsaSS09c7TUY_dKQ5tfa6_Ubg7uac7tRyM%3D) Wilmot stands with the women of Montana because he knows gender issues are human rights issues. He’s always fighting for a more just and equitable society in everything he does. Meanwhile, Senator Daines pushes Trump’s dangerous agenda from opposing paid leave and equal pay to actively trying to reverse Roe v. Wade. Montana’s women deserve better. We all deserve better than the constant onslaught of our rights by GOP leaders who want to take us back to the social structure of the 1950s. So, on behalf of Wilmot and Maddie Collins, we wish you a happy International Women’s Day. Actions speak louder than words, and Wilmot has put his beliefs into action by supporting equal rights for all women. **[If you’re with him, please make a donation today.](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=e9da52d2b01f4664b99347f7160b4b14&_e=amwlMvBDreTCGdxrrcYRfeMrxcyd2icHBZoa9lzIEZB9aB9ZFLGymYLECtP8VVkyupHPsTaCRqBVAZI4rVxJujMfpTTFXFJqFyxJ1Gr-INse3ZGTR8MBboqeJzm-wPetL1PZel1rgm-ZMeBcocs5CpURTqDa3kRjuYYBH6aBxd3JqWF7mmL8sDU07dZwqSVex9ASoA2fcQ7grOGRNEJhlQaai_qTsb5Bp6TXTD31vNqpCXq9hNMDvxfk2asK1WOZ4MUkzzQ0c5Tq1XQ_eFjTR6fIN3oVzuDOD0IoMfm8Xddu57Vjxm23DzmyNAn71nFZpO5BrN02R3kmXBMnK4jwvx11CKdiB0KfMBDdejKEonSzsHuG4FMNFjpnSvavPyAHoT_D0Qmhp6LrGf5IS_RzhNd8BrUQN-P6KYj8WSwtxT34PAaxifxFMLIJ9ZlCZPW32pWC9NUxq1_QqtGs5Vi1u4KLLukoOKPco5yjs2AwRvA%3D)** [DONATE](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=e9da52d2b01f4664b99347f7160b4b14&_e=amwlMvBDreTCGdxrrcYRfeMrxcyd2icHBZoa9lzIEZB9aB9ZFLGymYLECtP8VVkyupHPsTaCRqBVAZI4rVxJujMfpTTFXFJqFyxJ1Gr-INse3ZGTR8MBboqeJzm-wPetL1PZel1rgm-ZMeBcocs5CpURTqDa3kRjuYYBH6aBxd3JqWF7mmL8sDU07dZwqSVex9ASoA2fcQ7grOGRNEJhlQaai_qTsb5Bp6TXTD31vNqpCXq9hNMDvxfk2asK1WOZ4MUkzzQ0c5Tq1XQ_eFjTR5NgkZJ4yDdb6J3daJlvAb3gr8vfVIUpvD5c-qwR4CRbOTc1qtVTXeMmr7v-yU6horqbRJVX6Eca9Fkkg-m930EsMRK1MaazsFvcmHyOU-wj3eU5NXL_L8ftaXXuOQgy1PYf4w8a35WW4bOgEfddhkCabbBW8VzmQHEysye8hECu-gbKpzfwjfGZKRyUUrW-wtJ6HvsBhhg8-RYaNurgwoo%3D) Thanks,

Women for Wilmot Wilmot Collins is Montana’s first black mayor, a 20+ year military Veteran, a refugee and now, a U.S. Senate candidate. Wilmot will prioritize fighting climate change, making healthcare a human right, economic opportunity, supporting our veterans, improving our public schools and keeping public lands in public hands. name: Rick Kennedy
subject: What's Happening?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
body:
Dear Friend,

For two and a half years I've stated that fiscal mismanagement combined with historically low interest rates would leave us in a poor position to combat an economic downturn. They leave us in even worse shape to deal with an actual crisis.

I've also advocated strongly to expand access to affordable health care to all Americans.

We're all waking up to the news that -

* The stock market is tanking
* Bond yields are plummeting
* Oil prices are cratering
* Italy is locking down
* Coronavirus cases are soaring
* Senator Ted Cruz is in self-quarantine

While economic indicators - job creation, unemployment, GDP etc. are still reasonably strong, they're trailing indicators that measure the past. The markets try to predict the future, and what they're predicting is not good.

Our lack of preparedness has been decades in the making. This particular crisis will stress our health care system and our budgets - both of which Pete Sessions voted consistently to erode during his decades in Congress. Do we really want to let him back in? I think not. It is critical that we hit our goal of raising $50,000 by the end of March. It's time to dig deep. Please chip in what you can, our future is at stake. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rk2020q1?refcode=03042020_em_line&amount=10]

Thank you,

Rick

name: Cory Booker
subject: I'm endorsing Joe Biden for president
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate
body:
| | |
---
| Team, A little more than a year ago, I entered the race for president because I believe to my core that Americans share a common pain that must be met with a renewed sense of common purpose -- because in America, the only way we make change real is when people join together, struggle together, and work together. And, while I'm no longer running for president, I still know that to win, Democrats need a nominee who understands that the way to beat Donald Trump is to bring people together. In this moral moment, our country needs a president who recognizes that the lines that divide us are nowhere near as strong as the ties that bind us. **[That's why I'm endorsing Joe Biden for president today. Please join me in supporting his campaign by making a donation to help us win back the White House in November.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden-booker-2020?refcode=em_fr_20200309_CB_20200309-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Joe is building the kind of campaign we need to win -- a campaign based on shared values, built by the kinds of multi-racial, multi-ethnic coalitions that have always been at the backbone of every movement for progress in our history. Joe is building the kind of campaign that will do more than remove one guy from one office. He will lead the Democratic Party to victory in races up and down the ballot across the country this November. Because Joe Biden understands that beating Donald Trump is the floor, it is not the ceiling. Joe is the type of leader our party and our country needs right now -- someone who can and will unite us in common purpose not just to win an election, but to take on our biggest challenges as Americans and to heal. **[It's so critical that we come together to make sure his campaign has the resources it needs to go the distance and win the presidency. Chip in right now to help Joe defeat Donald Trump.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden-booker-2020?refcode=em_fr_20200309_CB_20200309-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** This is a fight for the soul of our country -- and Joe Biden is going to win it. I hope you'll join us. All my best, Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden-booker-2020?refcode=em_fr_20200309_CB_20200309-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

---
| | Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate.
---

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0faa/5fca0d19/7a5436f7/291d0176/3673161138/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0faa/5fca0d19/7a5436f7/291d0175/3673161138/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0faa/5fca0d19/7a5436f7/291d0174/3673161138/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0faa/5fca0d19/7a5436f7/291d0173/3673161138/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/unsubscribe").

name: =?utf-8?Q?Catherine=20Engelbrecht?=
subject: Socialist failures
body:
Help Stop the Fraud Revolution! | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us8.campaign-archive.com/?e=ad8cba7e98&u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=018cd19b1b)
---
| | |
---
| |
---
# **Socialist Revolution**
## **Q: What do Iowa, Nevada, and Venezuela have in common?**
**A: Election manipulation and fraud.**

Dear Friend -

Fraud is the hallmark of elections in socialist countries like Venezuela, Cuba, and North Korea.

Free and fair elections? No. One person, one vote? Hardly.

Now, America faces a Democrat party lurching towards socialist revolution. 'Democratic Socialism' is Socialism. It's the expansion of government control and restriction of individual freedom.

**Freedom is part of our DNA as Americans. We will not cede it willingly. And that's why Democratic Socialism is so incredibly dangerous. If they don't like the outcome of their elections, they change them. Sorry, free and fair vote, Socialists don't play that way.

**

You can help us stand against the radicals who want to bring the same chaos to November's election that they're now bringing to the Democrat primaries.

**Make no mistake, this is not a partisan argument. Our country needs more than one political party. True the Vote is not partisan. We are pro-vote. We are pro-election integrity. We are pro-freedom. **

Our plan is to it reach 1,000,000 volunteers to serve in the 2020 elections. We've just launched a free **[new e-book on Election Integrity](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=80777a2706&e=ad8cba7e98) ,** with more trainings, videos, and podcasts coming in the days ahead. We are digging the trenches!

**[If you’re able, please show your support by making a donation today](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=ec10e6679f&e=ad8cba7e98)** to help ensure a free and fair election in 2020! $25, $50, $100 ... or more ... whatever you feel moved to give, it will all be put to immediate use as we continue to expand our efforts nationwide.
|
---
| [PROTECT AMERICA'S ELECTIONS](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=01a62c72d2&e=ad8cba7e98 "PROTECT AMERICA'S ELECTIONS")
---
| Thank you in advance for your contribution. Your donation will serve to support the deployment of citizens, veterans, first-responders, all who love our country, respect the sanctity of our elections, and are willing to standing against a socialist revolution. Working together, we really can true the vote.

Thank you again!

Onward!

Catherine Engelbrecht
Founder, True the Vote

_P.S. We've had an overwhelming response from the veteran and first responder communities signing up with Continue to Serve. **[If you don't know about it, please check it out!](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=51ba2d3df0&e=ad8cba7e98) **If you've already signed up, be assured we're setting up teams and will be back in touch soon!_

_P.S.S. Stay tuned for information on our upcoming Freedom Summit in the summer of 2020! There will be lots happening in the days ahead!_

Donations made to True the Vote are tax deductible.

We are digging the trenches! to help ensure a free and fair election in 2020! $25, $50, $100 ... or more ... whatever you feel moved to give, it will all be put to immediate use as we continue to expand our efforts nationwide. | | "PROTECT AMERICA'S ELECTIONS" | Thank you in advance for your contribution. Your donation will serve to support the deployment of citizens, veterans, first-responders, all who love our country, respect the sanctity of our elections, and are willing to standing against a socialist revolution. Working together, we really can true the vote. Thank you again! Onward! Catherine Engelbrecht Founder, True the Vote P.S. name: Elisa Cardnell
subject: I'm suspending my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elisa Cardnell for Congress
body:
I can't thank you enough.
Peter,
When we began this campaign no one thought this race was possible. Every rating had Dan Crenshaw in a safe seat with no chance of flipping, but we knew that wasn’t true. We organized, we built a movement here in Houston, and showed that voters across the spectrum want to hold their leaders accountable. That’s what this race has always been about, putting country over party and holding Dan Crenshaw accountable.
Our movement is strong. We received over 5,000 contributions to our campaign. We received over 17,000 votes, more than the past Democratic nominee for TX-02. But unfortunately, after a hard look at the numbers, we do not have the resources and clear path to reach a majority in the runoff. That is why today I am suspending my campaign for the US House of Representatives for the Texas 2nd district.
This is not the outcome any of us were hoping for, but ultimately it is the best thing for our party so the fight against Dan Crenshaw can start today, not in May. Dan Crenshaw has built a multi-million war chest funded by private prison groups, Big Pharma, the Koch’s, and other corporate donors. He has voted with Trump over 93% of the time and is the 5th most frequent Congressional visitor to the Trump properties. If we are going to hold him accountable, we need to start that work today instead of giving him more time to build a corporate war chest.
I am deeply humbled by the support we have received. The fight for working-class representation in DC doesn’t end here. I’m not done fighting for universal healthcare, a living wage, a green economy, safe schools, our veterans, and ending the influence of money in politics.
I hope you’ll join me in supporting Sima Ladjevardian in this fight against Dan Crenshaw and his corporate donors.
Elisa Cardnell

name: Nina Ahmad
subject: Breaking News: Influential Labor Organization, the Philadelphia Council AFL-CIO endorses Nina Ahmad for Pennsylvania Auditor General
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for PA
body:
(PHILADELPHIA, PA) - With at least two-thirds of union support, the Philadelphia Council AFL-CIO, comprised of over 100 local labor unions representing close to 200,000 working men and women in the public sector, private industry, and the building and construction trades, endorsed Dr. Nina Ahmad for state-wide Auditor General it was announced today.

The mission of the Philadelphia Council is to bring social and economic justice to working families by giving them a voice on the job, in politics, and in the community. The Philadelphia Council AFL-CIO is committed to strengthening the union movement by educating and motivating union members, supporting the right of workers to join unions, and creating a powerful political voice that speaks for workers.

Dr. Nina Ahmad was honored to earn widespread support from the AFL-CIO and Philadelphia working families. Added Nina, "I believe labor and unions are the backbone of this country and our Commonwealth of Pennsylvania. I fight for their rights because they fought for me. As a young person, before I earned a doctorate at UPenn or advocated for change as President of NOW and as a Deputy Mayor, they fought violence, divisiveness, and despair--and unions changed my life. My work is just-returns for a movement that gave me safe-passage and a vision of community. I am grateful, energized and humbled for their support for this campaign"

This endorsement comes on the heels of State Senators Art Haywood, Katie Muth, and Anthony Williams, Montgomery Treasurer Jason Salus, State Representatives Joanna McClinton, Jordan Harris, Steve Kinsey, and Jared Solomon, Councilmembers Cindy Bass and Kenyatta Johnson, and Philadelphia Sheriff, Rochelle Bilal. State-wide organizational endorsements have come from the Philadelphia Laborers, the Philadelphia Building Trades Second Generation PAC, AAPI Victory Fund, AAA Fund, Progressive Women of NEPA, University of Pennsylvania Democrats, and the Delaware County Democratic Committee and others.

Nina will be the first woman of color to hold a statewide office in Pennsylvania. More information and links to donate to the campaign can be found at [www.ninaforpa.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/u83R0_musBNVMh7o2vje-TbbSuovWDT2txqjyjNy9HM=/rgRv7AuWNAPBA87p3gubVst09FVt5oaoJeyh9r4yP7k=).

Paid for by Nina for PA
---

Philadelphia PA 19107 United States

name: Tina Smith
subject: Why I’m endorsing…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
It’s been a whirlwind since I first was sworn into the United States Senate, friend. On that day in January 2018, I had my family standing next to me as I was sworn in as Minnesota’s next U.S. Senator. Shortly after I took the oath, I headed to my new office where someone had requested to meet with me for a few minutes to check in and share some words of advice. That person was Vice President Joe Biden. Joe shared with me that the Senate is a place based on building relationships and working hard — advice drawn from his years of experience in the Senate and as Vice President. Here's what I know: Joe has been working to build a more perfect union his entire life. And at this moment in our country’s story, I believe that he is the best person to lead us forward. That’s why today I’m supporting Joe Biden. He’s shown me that he has the heart, the experience, and the values to lead us forward as President. With Joe, we can take back the Senate and say goodbye to Mitch McConnell’s cynical efforts to obstruct progress and put special interests before the people’s interests. We can fulfill the promise that every American has access to health care they can afford. We can lower prescription drug prices and protect and expand Social Security. We can take bold steps to address climate change and gun violence. We can get dark money out of our politics and defend voting rights and the rights of people to come together to organize for better wages and benefits and safe places to work. **But you know as well as I do that to take back the White House, Joe is going to need all of our grassroots support. So I’m coming to ask you today — will you make a donation to Joe’s campaign for President and my Senate campaign? It is your support that will make sure we have the resources to put us on a path to victory in November.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Chip in $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15892000/168223264/-949941937?refcode=em200309-biden&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,1000&firstname=&lastname=&email=&addr1=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&recurring=yes&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjhhYzY3Zi0yNTYyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=stF4gFvZubKn6a-KZad-T93eT8Ahop4Iwts0edNXlO8=)

Here's what I know: Joe has been working to build a more perfect union his entire life. And at this moment in our country’s story, I believe that he is the best person to lead us forward. That’s why today I’m supporting Joe Biden. He’s shown me that he has the heart, the experience, and the values to lead us forward as President. With Joe, we can take back the Senate and say goodbye to Mitch McConnell’s cynical efforts to obstruct progress and put special interests before the people’s interests. We can fulfill the promise that every American has access to health care they can afford. We can lower prescription drug prices and protect and expand Social Security. We can take bold steps to address climate change and gun violence. We can get dark money out of our politics and defend voting rights and the rights of people to come together to organize for better wages and benefits and safe places to work. But you know as well as I do that to take back the White House, Joe is going to need all of our grassroots support. So I’m coming to ask you today — will you make a donation to Joe’s campaign for President and my Senate campaign? It is your support that will make sure we have the resources to put us on a path to victory in November. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = I am so grateful for Vice President Biden’s ongoing leadership and passion for this country — and I know he will be a great President and trust him to do what’s right for the state and country we love so much. I hope you’ll join me in supporting him. Thanks. — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

subject: Vote Tomorrow!
body:
It's Almost Election Day! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/410518a9d265/vote-tomorrow?e=6645c92bcf)
---
| |
---
| |
**_PLEASE VOTE TOMORROW!_ **
Dear Friend,

The Republican primary election is tomorrow!

If you can help make sure we have a big turnout, we can send a message that Mississippi still believes in the conservative values of faith, family and freedom.

I’m asking for your vote so I can continue fighting for you in the United States Congress.

I’ve voted with [President Trump’s position 97% of the time](https://michaelguest.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae3ece7e42a6ae24d22e0094b&id=149d65cf60&e=6645c92bcf) on legislation to grow our economy, secure our border and strengthen our military.

My continued commitment is to always strive to represent you in a way that makes you proud.

I hope you will [join our campaign](https://michaelguest.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae3ece7e42a6ae24d22e0094b&id=3ff72dd1bc&e=6645c92bcf) and I would be honored to have your vote so I can continue working on your behalf in Congress.

Please encourage your family, friends and co-workers to vote in tomorrow’s important election. Thank you!
Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Michael Guest

# Polo Town Hall for tonight canceled.
Unfortunately, we are postponing our Polo Town Hall that was originally scheduled for tonight.**For the last week, Dani has had the flu, and she recently lost her voice**. We avoided postponing the town hall in hopes that she would recover, but sadly that has not happened. When the town hall is rescheduled, we will make sure to get the word out. We are sorry for any inconvenience this might cause.

#TeamDani

body:
I just got off the phone with my campaign manager and the rest of our team. We are planning our strategy for the final months of the campaign and figuring out the best way to get our message out to every Democratic voter | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/FAE/ni0YAA/t.2zx/aOzfMcXERuuvEOu6a0LP4g/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKHoukhvVCpyWYNTSQZpWoThIGB9gxATCiuzX00GWEtdmwFwe63NsaFiHeqt7sle42b5jWe8XU79KwAA2sIoOR5w4-2FkSOMq-2B7O0byLpVeWhX35DDe9C4OMiD5zMHMhM0i-2Fq6IjM33eZFJtFb0Oe5tWb00M-2F7xv-2FAbrvuREy2dtv2hftanBUEHVIKZUc2-2FndRNuHi6G3d2huUmQNWVxDC2JIP9h9wCZe-2BRq80AZ8V8nx8w-3D-3D/NqnY)
Friend, **** **** **** I just got off the phone with my campaign manager and the rest of our team. We are planning our strategy for the final months of the campaign and figuring out the best way to get our message out to every Democratic voter in New York’s 17th Congressional District. A big part of that will be our field program, but we also need to send mailers, produce TV commercials, and place digital ads so we can stand out in this crowded primary.
This is going to be the most expensive part of the campaign, but right now, our fundraising isn’t where we need it to be to pay for everything we need to run a winning campaign. It’s crucial that we raise the resources to pay for our media strategy now, so that in the final weeks of the campaign we can turn our focus away from fundraising and spend all of our time directly contacting voters. **_[Will you make a donation today so we can fully fund our campaign strategy and win in June?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/FAE/ni0YAA/t.2zx/aOzfMcXERuuvEOu6a0LP4g/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKHoukhvVCpyWYNTSQZpWoThIGB9gxATCiuzX00GWEtdrpAICQMOUUZ9Tx9ei5m5Sm2h410NUUwe8AXNSVP7pagOtuQhEIc2FamJAwW3-2FVZiSfi53GgqwMgjtul7kqYj1fHQ0cVPXA-2FaZZixeO6ptmyCGE84GGxD-2BGw70-2FyLRS-2BVzH2HkwhzgZIUPzUHAjU9h-2BhD7iYedTl1zJr8x4NeMnm4fxKT2xdV6D8qVFD3ljReg-3D-3D/M2Wq)_**
The unfortunate truth is that we have some opponents who are self-funding hundreds of thousands, if not millions, of dollars, in an attempt to drown out our message. Others are using corporate PAC contributions to fund their campaigns. We’re not relying on either. Our campaign is funded by people like you chipping in what they can to support our vision of electing a new type of leader to Congress.
I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t so important. What we raise now will determine whether we win or lose in June. **_[Can you contribute today to make sure we can finish this campaign strong?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/FAE/ni0YAA/t.2zx/aOzfMcXERuuvEOu6a0LP4g/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKHoukhvVCpyWYNTSQZpWoThIGB9gxATCiuzX00GWEtdspQsfHB0NypgdQ0ZkU95-2BTcMWH3nOJHqF0XMJzZWJGf7POVaNhVI-2FZCTY3VHvTRdAaY-2FPbPfVjFVpbyh3S1IUVFxOWtc-2FLu-2FnBWugVLhsdKcV-2FpvoRbkWWuJwSHRavlbiUaU8JcLjsvAnWM-2FYFSTUCuny3gkvTiFtsqwyZqcDMyLqXkrdAGZHWthCSTx3IOlA-3D-3D/qtoy)_** **_[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/FAE/ni0YAA/t.2zx/aOzfMcXERuuvEOu6a0LP4g/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKHoukhvVCpyWYNTSQZpWoThIGB9gxATCiuzX00GWEtdm2-2FBr-2FU7p4oLA6aEcEsfZ4c6Pba1ugmvAJ2ZOU-2FHK0KpXGnuvv5oxKNJoTABd8pCWdtYU-2B8eeJWi4T94DYi9i4OIMHp1A-2F9yA44ujLPQhLUrrTNlt32tAGy6nOAtxOAqEJWXsDM20SnlDmg7lEOB2qRn3DC2PepWnCX9-2FPPgvqKFsXoX9cltxQ7eZ965tdTRg-3D-3D/WioY)_**

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: A strong leader for Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brian Fitzpatrick for Congress
body:
This past weekend I had the pleasure of spending time with Brian Fitzpatrick in Pennsylvania, and let me tell you...the people of Pennsylvania are lucky
[ ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=4cd84130cde541118d2244a03e9f3bcf&_e=LKf21LCiRUaas0LC1Bee0rwFL_EjPE5FUAEvQ11nWPjw8_llSovUFfCMgBaUg7hD5imPgvJqYwz0U49lq_czpaUoDX2_a87rI8mDXpNIuS6RzCFmCom-wduW0aAAMNrYnaH7CEtbpzX16IpYN_bvFn9DdfoqpqQhcNuM5AOmSCTG-_WKvxgagmlkkOISiaGOxKXjZDn5B_jHmVAH6u7fh-_uXijxR-6oWe_LWrFE5F19pavWGGD7NbsY7miZg1ywTahk7aGz5JYMvMszuA0MxkO1tWCDM604dyeL5nhlnn6qXb40NEuD5yQ_8ycLbTFNtWAaI6VH9JORe_M1_TRj99nuXZTdDsVMPM_YhgfvaueEaav3QB68ugHkew7Io7ry_tEzCfEKC_I_qaIxddn_UrHGmwl0EW2_-dN4MZz2ktP5K34lJmVkALZI3P3S7VFVIB4IdD5WdG0GsKByDcUK_nOqvatevTJy3rizODhQqJs%3D) Friend, This past weekend I had the pleasure of spending time with Brian Fitzpatrick in Pennsylvania, and let me tell you...the people of Pennsylvania are lucky to have him. During his time in Congress, Brian has successfully championed legislation to improve the lives of the people of Pennsylvania’s 1st district. But the Radical Left has their sights set on beating Brian and destroying the progress he’s made for the families of Pennsylvania. Today, I’m asking for **YOUR **support to keep Brian and his commonsense agenda in Congress. [ **Stand with Brian** ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=4cd84130cde541118d2244a03e9f3bcf&_e=LKf21LCiRUaas0LC1Bee0rwFL_EjPE5FUAEvQ11nWPjw8_llSovUFfCMgBaUg7hD5imPgvJqYwz0U49lq_czpaUoDX2_a87rI8mDXpNIuS6RzCFmCom-wduW0aAAMNrYnaH7CEtbpzX16IpYN_bvFn9DdfoqpqQhcNuM5AOmSCTG-_WKvxgagmlkkOISiaGOxKXjZDn5B_jHmVAH6u7fh-_uXijxR-6oWe_LWrFE5F2cONE4t741cWeqTLlulX9cmbnCoJrw6FqykxWDPx5pvKEi_7ExszN1t3RNDHxA7Nj3OdyDidT6w9wrc6j-9fTREZgdChwz3tBlt1Z-FSsQ1eR4WbyYlC5mJRT2O1SQeD-_KEFQMgEEulLwSGPGS9giSJLJeX4Z23sD4w46KxX5RdljeeYcsOilXaVW5IImfysqtnsfqLIqhS55Tmc3PZqfVPS9ITMCvNGfBjdyWOKy0lYn2TRNbI-QovSP73P8qDg%3D) Brian is a fighter, and he’s spent his time in Congress fighting for solutions to our nation’s toughest issues. From lowering prescription drug costs to supporting free trade agreements like USMCA that help America’s farmers and manufacturers, Brian keeps the best interests of his constituents in mind when making the tough decisions. With your help, Brian will stand for strong, commonsense solutions to Pennsylvania’s most pressing problems and will continue fighting back against the scourge of socialism in America. The pathway to securing a Republican majority in the House runs straight through Pennsylvania’s 1st district, and our journey together starts with **YOU**. **[Please donate today to support Brian and his commonsense vision for a better America.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=4cd84130cde541118d2244a03e9f3bcf&_e=LKf21LCiRUaas0LC1Bee0rwFL_EjPE5FUAEvQ11nWPjw8_llSovUFfCMgBaUg7hD5imPgvJqYwz0U49lq_czpaUoDX2_a87rI8mDXpNIuS6RzCFmCom-wduW0aAAMNrYnaH7CEtbpzX16IpYN_bvFn9DdfoqpqQhcNuM5AOmSCTG-_WKvxgagmlkkOISiaGOxKXjZDn5B_jHmVAH6u7fh-_uXijxR-6oWe_LWrFE5F0ZDqz5naqEcnlZTaaHubCkL956AbWBB6nk0pZ1kUJyiztsGl6w46oUKp1BjuHCffs1AkAUCz3ptQs4hkYvWQTZGlD-mDb28H7DkCj_wxYRjrREUcGUSoS9PNeaNMlRkMgY5UNtSII-zdOaX244nKbgYcm1YxyURnf_kQqSfFFvh_TFsauHnsmb4DTBoRnFJYacTWyveG2Rb7bh6-Rb4UWyUHCrSSQPG5QXEsXa-HiGTU6JvsO5eBcBknd0MKeoOIM%3D)** [ **Donate Now** ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ead9bf7a690f4383800cf0b1db0a8361&_m=4cd84130cde541118d2244a03e9f3bcf&_e=LKf21LCiRUaas0LC1Bee0rwFL_EjPE5FUAEvQ11nWPjw8_llSovUFfCMgBaUg7hD5imPgvJqYwz0U49lq_czpaUoDX2_a87rI8mDXpNIuS6RzCFmCom-wduW0aAAMNrYnaH7CEtbpzX16IpYN_bvFn9DdfoqpqQhcNuM5AOmSCTG-_WKvxgagmlkkOISiaGOxKXjZDn5B_jHmVAH6u7fh-_uXijxR-6oWe_LWrFE5F1fshqScc4lYteuX3m2pMJvExW0YV-OuqwAyWQsZM2dkne6VNv263ldIY9So9LOprgi2Ykz-Q_rxAr2faAO4X41tHsZyC2ACxKkEr8rtfC7gkuaOd7EFbgzapkRZilglmYg0ttHT0ZhqMVthhrh0wuDRRMi4hsWj7uP9ma3ZzfoT-fN63Ar3ql3KrQuWT3DyvOthb1bnVm3TVojR11tN8dZ0NkZPdKzok0_SFaGfOYUlCoEYbcO0Gazbw359MqS-gg%3D) Thank you, Kevin McCarthy House GOP Leader

name: Bill Olson
subject: "You will pay the price!"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://secure.anedot.com/william-olson-for-congress/st

Hi Peter

Have you ever heard a sitting U.S. Senator threaten harm to Supreme Court Justices he didn't agree with?

This week, we all have:

A fired-up Senator Minority Leader Chuck Schumer, D-N.Y., appeared to issue a vague warning toward Supreme Court Justices Neil Gorsuch and Brett Kavanaugh on Wednesday, during a rally held as the court heard arguments in a high-profile abortion case.

"I want to tell you, Gorsuch. I want to tell you, Kavanaugh. You have released the whirlwind and you will pay the price!" Schumer warned. "You won’t know what hit you if you go forward with these awful decisions."

This is not the first time a Democratic senator issued vague warnings toward the Supreme Court. In August, a group of senators led by Sen. Sheldon Whitehouse, D-R.I., filed a brief in which they accused the court of being politicized, calling it "not well" and warning that if it does not "heal itself," it could be "restructured." This was taken as a warning that the Democrats would attempt to pack the court by increasing the number of justices and loading the bench with liberals once a Democrat is in the White House.

Let us be clear- this is yet another instance of violent insane Democrats who refuse to be civil with people who disagree with them. This is what happens when you elect violent Antifa thugs to power.

I know- I am running against one of those Antifa Congressmen, Darren Soto. This guy is yet another crazy "woke" extremist intent on waging War on America.

We need fighters to stop the Democrats' War on America. I can stop this! Can you help me win in Florida's 9th?

https://secure.anedot.com/william-olson-for-congress/st

I have an important fundraising deadline at the end of this month- I have to raise another $35,000 to keep pace with Soto's dirty Soros and Bloomberg money.

Can I count on you for a donation

https://secure.anedot.com/william-olson-for-congress/st
of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple? Can you help me reach my goal?

I need your help to oust these insane Dems from Congress. The numbers are there for us to win! Let's send "nutjob" Nancy Pelosi home in defeat!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://secure.anedot.com/william-olson-for-congress/st

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://secure.anedot.com/william-olson-for-congress/st

P.S. This is congressional seat we can win in the swing state of Florida. I must defeat this radical socialist Democrat. Please contribute now before the end of the month whatever you can afford.

https://secure.anedot.com/william-olson-for-congress/st
No amount is too small. God bless you and thank you - Bill.

P.P.S. You are invited to my campaign kick off in Kissimmee, FL on March 17th at the Italian Joint starting at 6 pm. Get your free ticket here.

https://www.eventbrite.com/e/bill-olson-for-congress-campaign-kick-off-tickets-98741018043
I look forward to meeting you!

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

Bill Olson is a retired member of the United States Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

5 Halifax Ct
Marlton NJ 08053
USA

Sheldon Whitehouse, D-R.I., filed a brief in which they accused the court of being politicized, calling it "not well" and warning that if it does not "heal itself," it could be "restructured." This was taken as a warning that the Democrats would attempt to pack the court by increasing the number of justices and loading the bench with liberals once a Democrat is in the White House. Let us be clear- this is yet another instance of violent insane Democrats who refuse to be civil with people who disagree with them. This is what happens when you elect violent Antifa thugs to power. I know- I am running against one of those Antifa Congressmen, Darren Soto. This guy is yet another crazy "woke" extremist intent on waging War on America. We need fighters to stop the Democrats' War on America. I can stop this! Can you help me win in Florida's 9th? I have an important fundraising deadline at the end of this month- I have to raise another $35,000 to keep pace with Soto's dirty Soros and Bloomberg money. Can I count on you for a donation of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple? Can you help me reach my goal? I need your help to oust these insane Dems from Congress. The numbers are there for us to win! Let's send "nutjob" Nancy Pelosi home in defeat! Let's get this done! Image Bill Olson Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars Supports President Trump Not a Career Politician Hard Core Conservative Fighter Image P.S. This is congressional seat we can win in the swing state of Florida. I must defeat this radical socialist Democrat. Please contribute now before the end of the month whatever you can afford. No amount is too small. God bless you and thank you - Bill. P.P.S. You are invited to my campaign kick off in Kissimmee, FL on March 17th at the Italian Joint starting at 6 pm. Get your free ticket here. I look forward to meeting you! PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS Bill Olson is a retired member of the United States Army. name: J.D. Scholten
subject: Why are we leaving our farmers in the dust?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter --

Our farmers are in jeopardy.

Last year, 24 family farms filed for bankruptcy in Iowa.

That’s 24 hardworking Iowa families who were forced to give up their livelihoods. Worse, the numbers show this is a 20% increase in farm bankruptcies since 2018 -- and 100% more than there should be, period.

When farms suffer in Iowa, we all suffer. They are the backbone of this district, holding towns together, keeping schools, grocery stores, and banks alive.

If we want to make sure we stop the plight of our family farmers, we need leaders who will be a strong voice for our farmers -- and **will stand tall with them every day.**

We need to support our neighbors and family farmers who are being pushed off the farm by the multinational corporations that control inputs, prices, markets, and choices. America needs our farmers, and our farmers need antitrust enforcement to have a fair shot.

name: MJ Hegar
subject: unacceptable barriers to the ballot box
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
I didn't serve my country to come home and watch our constitutional rights be eroded in plain sight.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890260/7f51f7bc/4c50a704/4ef18d72/16858561/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

Last Tuesday, Texans all over the state -- particularly Black and Latino Texans -- faced unacceptable institutional barriers to the ballot box. What we saw was voter suppression in action, plain and simple.

Voting restrictions that are designed to target minority communities, like **the closure of hundreds of polling sites in Black and Latino neighborhoods** , are unacceptable. And we need to restore the Voting Rights Act so they can never happen again. **[Will you add your name to my petition if you agree?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890260/7f51f7bc/4c50a704/4ef18d71/16858561/VEsE/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-votingrights")**

I'm running for Senate to fight for _all_ Texans -- no matter how they vote. **But Sen. Cornyn led the charge AGAINST fixing the Voting Rights Act.** Frankly, I'm of the opinion that if you need to keep people from voting to win an election, you probably shouldn't be running for office at all.

I didn't serve my country to come home and watch our constitutional rights be eroded in plain sight. I'm going to fight to fix the Voting Rights Act and protect _every_ American's right to vote -- but I need you by my side to help.

**[If you're with me in this fight, add your name to my petition calling on the Senate to fix the Voting Rights Act and make sure no qualified voter faces institutional barriers to the ballot box ever again.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890260/7f51f7bc/4c50a704/4ef18d71/16858561/VEsF/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-votingrights")** **[**SIGN THE PETITION**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890260/7f51f7bc/4c50a704/4ef18d71/16858561/VEsC/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-votingrights")** Thanks,
MJ Hegar

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890260/7f51f7bc/4c50a704/4ef18d70/16858561/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwNDQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-donation-tx?refcode=email_20200309.2__1044__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Trump Administration Takes Action on Healthcare
body:
"For many Americans, collecting and navigating their own health care records is a frustrating, time-consuming burden that leads to lower quality..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=016f5944be&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Trump Administration Takes Action on Healthcare**

“For many Americans, collecting and navigating their own health care records is a frustrating, time-consuming burden that leads to lower quality and higher costs. Until now,” write Senior Advisor Jared Kushner, CMS Administrator Seema Verma, and National Coordinator for Health Information Technology Dr. Don Rucker in _USA Today_.

“The Trump administration is now taking action to ensure that every American has secure access to their own health records.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b773ae73f0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “While the coronavirus continues to pose a threat to the nation, it certainly didn’t put a damper on America’s strong and growing economy in February . . . The country gained an astounding 273,000 new jobs last month, matching January’s total and demolishing economists’ expectations again,” former business executive Andy Puzder writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=501a07944c&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “President Donald Trump encountered a flattened landscape of shredded homes, snapped trees and broken families when he arrived Friday on the Cumberland Plateau. Trump came to survey the fallout from deadly tornadoes that tore through Tennessee this week, leaving 25 dead. Before he left, he pledged to support the survivors, many of whom had lost homes, belongings and loved ones,” the [_Nashville Tennessean_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ccf3d1a357&e=3ee4985eea) reports.
---
|
---
| Fox News’ town hall with President Trump last week was the most-watched event of its kind in history, according to Nielsen media research. “The event co-moderated by Bret Baier and Martha MacCallum averaged 4.2 million viewers from 6:30-7:30 p.m. ET. The record-setting town hall dominated cable news, topping MSNBC’s 1.4 million viewers and CNN’s 1 million viewers combined,” Brian Flood reports for [**Fox News**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0c127b0641&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f4c3e8cb84&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ba1901e8f7&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=6717b1dd03)
---

Tonight is a major deadline for fundraising.
** We need your help! **
**[](https://act.myngp.com/el/q2jLbKFL38HeSRtUPvBhzGWxZEzH9AdJFUFvmxEokFI=/Dgw1pmvGAMR0LzzlVJVzJ8Lz8nhPCGmlfSLri3ZiCy0=)**
As a grassroots supporter of [Nina Ahmad](https://act.myngp.com/el/q2jLbKFL38HeSRtUPvBhzGWxZEzH9AdJFUFvmxEokFI=/Dgw1pmvGAMR0LzzlVJVzJ8Lz8nhPCGmlfSLri3ZiCy0=) for Auditor General**,** you're at the heart of our campaign -- and we want to share how our collective hard-work is already producing results:
We are so proud to announce endorsements from:
* Congressman Brendan Boyle
* Philadelphia Council AFL-CIO
* State Senators Art Haywood, Katie Muth, and Anthony Williams, Montgomery Treasurer Jason Salus
* State Representatives Joanna McClinton, Jordan Harris, Steve Kinsey, and Jared Solomon
* Councilmembers Cindy Bass and Kenyatta Johnson, and Philadelphia Sheriff, Rochelle Bilal
* State-wide organizational endorsements have come from the Philadelphia Laborers, the Philadelphia Building Trades Second Generation PAC, AAPI Victory Fund, AAA Fund, Progressive Women of NEPA, University of Pennsylvania Democrats, and the Delaware County Democratic Committee and many others.

So the work we do now -- talking with voters and sharing why we're in this fight to end the corrosive effects of Donald Trump -- could make all the difference on **April 28th, 2020**.
Can Nina count on you to support her campaign with at least a [$5 dollar donation ](https://act.myngp.com/el/q2jLbKFL38HeSRtUPvBhzGWxZEzH9AdJFUFvmxEokFI=/Dgw1pmvGAMR0LzzlVJVzJ8Lz8nhPCGmlfSLri3ZiCy0=)before the filing deadline tonight? Visit [ninaforpa.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/q2jLbKFL38HeSRtUPvBhzGWxZEzH9AdJFUFvmxEokFI=/XjNQPpGZ2wP72W6x9zMgv26HJYQvvrtptnC0EK8_T14=)[ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/q2jLbKFL38HeSRtUPvBhzGWxZEzH9AdJFUFvmxEokFI=/Dgw1pmvGAMR0LzzlVJVzJ8Lz8nhPCGmlfSLri3ZiCy0=)now.
We're investing every single dollar we receive to this email to make key organizing investments that will help our campaign come out strong and help Nina secure the Democratic nomination.
Your donation will make a big impact today. Help us break through.
** Visit [ninaforpa.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/q2jLbKFL38HeSRtUPvBhzGWxZEzH9AdJFUFvmxEokFI=/XjNQPpGZ2wP72W6x9zMgv26HJYQvvrtptnC0EK8_T14=)**
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/q2jLbKFL38HeSRtUPvBhzGWxZEzH9AdJFUFvmxEokFI=/Dgw1pmvGAMR0LzzlVJVzJ8Lz8nhPCGmlfSLri3ZiCy0=)
** Please contribute now.**

Paid for by Nina for PA

Philadelphia PA 19107 United States

body:
---
| | **[_Wow! Since our beloved President called us to action to flip the Senate, Democrats EVISCERATED McConnell 's lead in the polls! Will you answer President Obama's call before midnight to seal the deal? Rush $10 to elect Ben Ray and OUST McConnell's Senate! >>_](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200309_em_fr_b1_oav_ia_rs&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")** FIRST President Obama personally called on us to defeat McConnell's Senate. | [](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200309_em_fr_b1_oav_ia_rs&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")
---

THEN
Democrats stepped up in a historic way -- and ERASED McConnell's lead in the polls!

[](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200309_em_fr_b1_oav_ia_rs&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")
---

NOW
If just 143 more Democrats step up for Ben Ray before midnight, he'll WIN his Senate race and OUST McConnell's Senate.

This is our once-in-a-lifetime shot -- we won't get another one like it.

Will you step up with $10 in these final 12 hours?

| ******[**Chip in $10 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200309_em_fr_b1_oav_ia_rs&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")******

******[**Chip in $20 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200309_em_fr_b1_oav_ia_rs&recurring=auto&amount=20&amounts=10,70,130,180")******

******[**Chip in $70 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200309_em_fr_b1_oav_ia_rs&recurring=auto&amount=70&amounts=10,20,130,180")******

******[**Chip in $130 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200309_em_fr_b1_oav_ia_rs&recurring=auto&amount=130&amounts=10,20,70,180")******
---

******[**Chip in another amount now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200309_em_fr_b1_oav_ia_rs&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")******

Thank you,

Team BRL

([CC BY-SA 2.0](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b667/18e32a7f/4e49c4c2/7b223dcd/1342136196/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/2.0/"))

[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b667/18e32a7f/4e49c4c2/7b223dc2/1342136196/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b667/18e32a7f/4e49c4c2/7b223dc3/1342136196/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b667/18e32a7f/4e49c4c2/7b223dc0/1342136196/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement? **[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b667/18e32a7f/4e49c4c2/7b223dc1/1342136196/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b667/18e32a7f/4e49c4c2/7b223dc6/1342136196/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails")

If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand.
Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b667/18e32a7f/4e49c4c2/7b223dc7/1342136196/VEsHAw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

clean_body: | "" | | Experts say Chabot has only a "small edge" We here on Team Nikki have always known that this race is competitive -- we hear it every day when we 're out knocking doors and talking to folks in our community. (Something that must be unfathomable to Steve Chabot after a quarter of a century in office!) But now three top political predictors have confirmed that this race is competitive -- and that as of this week, Steve Chabot has only a "small edge"! "" This is huge. Steve Chabot's time is UP -- for all his big talk, we're already primed to take him on. "" | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" This is a big step toward building the momentum that can take down one of Trump 's top Republicans. Right now, we need to show Chabot that his small edge is even more precarious than he thinks -- and his history of cruel and inhumane votes to strip us of our health care and his refusal to protect our Social Security are catching up with him. "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" We're in this together, Team Nikki | | Nikki Foster is a US Air Force veteran, a working mom, and a Democrat running for Congress in Ohio's 1st congressional district. If you'd like to support Nikki Foster for Ohio, you can "" We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can "" If you'd like to unsubscribe from all our emails, "" | Paid for by Nikki Foster for Ohio Nikki Foster for Ohio PO Box 537 Mason, OH 45040 mailto:info@nikkifosteroh.com "" ""

name: 2020 Watch
subject: Need your input, Peter (Bernie vs. Joe)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | Who is your choice? Peter: Mike Bloomberg and Elizabeth Warren have dropped out of the 2020 race, leaving **Joe Biden and Bernie Sanders** as the main contenders. **[Take our SNAP POLL -- who do you want as your Democratic nominee?](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0559/72412298/4eb456f8/61041e76/4171671471/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "http://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200309_BidenorBernie_U2_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1+-+Take+our+SNAP+POLL++who+do+you+want+as+y&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200309_BidenorBernie_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200309_BidenorBernie_U2_X2")** [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0559/72412298/4eb456f8/61041e79/4171671471/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "http://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200309_BidenorBernie_U2_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200309_BidenorBernie_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200309_BidenorBernie_U2_X2") **[(And who should they pick as their running mate?)](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0559/72412298/4eb456f8/61041e78/4171671471/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "http://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200309_BidenorBernie_U2_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+And+who+should+they+pick+as+their+runnin&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200309_BidenorBernie_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200309_BidenorBernie_U2_X2")** We will support the Democratic nominee no matter who it is. To save our democracy, we MUST dump Trump and ditch Mitch. **On Tuesday, voters in Idaho, Michigan, Mississippi, Missouri, North Dakota, and Washington State go to the polls to help choose the Democratic nominee. ** [**But no matter where you 're voting, we want to hear from you -- between Bernie and Joe, who is your top choice?**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0559/72412298/4eb456f8/61041e7b/4171671471/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "http://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200309_BidenorBernie_U2_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+But+no+matter+where+yoursquore+voting+we&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200309_BidenorBernie_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200309_BidenorBernie_U2_X2") | | | [TAKE THE SNAP POLL >>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0559/72412298/4eb456f8/61041e7a/4171671471/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200309_BidenorBernie_U2_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5+-+TAKE+THE+SNAP+POLL+gtgt&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200309_BidenorBernie_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200309_BidenorBernie_U2_X2")
---

We love hearing from you! Thanks for your input,

\-- the Voter Protection Project

| [Voter Protection Project](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0559/72412298/4eb456f8/61041e7d/4171671471/VEsA/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=6+-+Voter+Protection+Project&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200309_BidenorBernie_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200309_BidenorBernie_U2_X2")

If you want THE Pro-Trump candidate as your Republican candidate for Congress, == Thank you so much for your support, | | P.S. == | | | == == == | | | PAID FOR BY CLAIRE CHASE FOR CONGRESS INC. | | Claire Chase for Congress | PO Box 8010, Roswell, NM 88202 | | Sent by mailto:info@clairechase.org

#
Folks... **Here's the bad news:** We're not on track to meet our very first FEC fundraising deadline of 2020. The reason we set weekly goals is to nip this sort of thing in the bud, but we only have until midnight to catch up. With Donald Trump and his allies looking for any sign of weakness in our FEC report, it's critical we reach this goal. Trump thinks Minnesota is ripe for the taking (_that's why his campaign is prepared to spend up to $30 MILLION to win_) and we can't prove him right. **Now, here's the good news:** If enough people step up with a grassroots donation, we'll get back on track before midnight, and muster the necessary resources to take on Trump and save Minnesota's Senate seat. **It really is that simple, folks. So, will you pitch in $10 (or more!) now to help us build a winning campaign here in Minnesota? name: Claudia Tenney
subject: I want to fight for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
Upstate New Yorkers are fighters, and we deserve someone who fights for us in Congress. [ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=3a32b479cd664ac4a2e559cd34f6ede6&_e=PzOJrcrAHVgw23E3Ys_K_S_IYCeqJFLSwF5AD0rW6KjgH0asTS4tZOxwVIFAqtZd0dpI3H_nlnNtaebR3xAUeKtzl8_75rbR6WmzO6-kL2ELTn8iZMiIjanDpCLjfoHEzqAg8Dz3L7P9vSIH_-2rvRkd_BmX3_ZBRmXHeMNzuWsFTy3UCFva-w7du1GmoYYv0kbWjd_5K0uPkQ2zffjzBZnU0bmuu0FE8XioleYzo0A1M5sg3_XmdSpSfTyXHPfmelEpHJLmHgiX1UJXjOG-a52Bj6gIitByiSz2_sKUGy_3UiTqjKnQ-WJYF1Oxl9SwjA7QgKpeP1xL3HAxPmL2ZEuy_fSlJS97MOt6XWNP-kWdRAozVPwsuIA5Rpe9760QT1GTGwak1EomCnC1wJTn0fETOA_3Jy5puKERRbUrCRtqMB2rTmLrxrDFBqaB4L1o-2BW5yoi3SCLTPHC8CwLT2ZVvVwPhOt_62UbzvN4o8mKLBg03iMIonZDXSmPXDEX) | |
---
Peter,

I'm a small business owner, single mother, and Upstate New Yorker. I know the value of hard work, determination, and grit. We fight to provide for our families every day, _and we need someone in Washington who fights for us._

Unfortunately, Anthony Brindisi has turned his back on us. Our district elected President Trump by 15%, but he doesn’t care. After promising to not support impeachment, **he voted for it THREE TIMES!**

**I’m fighting to put Upstate New York first.[Will you join me?](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=3a32b479cd664ac4a2e559cd34f6ede6&_e=PzOJrcrAHVgw23E3Ys_K_S_IYCeqJFLSwF5AD0rW6KjgH0asTS4tZOxwVIFAqtZd0dpI3H_nlnNtaebR3xAUeKtzl8_75rbR6WmzO6-kL2ELTn8iZMiIjanDpCLjfoHEzqAg8Dz3L7P9vSIH_-2rvRkd_BmX3_ZBRmXHeMNzuWsFTy3UCFva-w7du1GmoYYv0kbWjd_5K0uPkQ2zffjzBZnU0bmuu0FE8XioleYzo0A1M5sg3_XmdSpSfTyXHPfmelEpHJLmHgiX1UJXjOG-a52Bj6gIitByiSz2_sKUGy8N9wSJEL_REMKZZAZQqjtLv6r1b0aWeC1DXcNwB_SP3XPxlW0lmJRUbycg2TA4nabjskOu4sEgXLUkFf4xd5aBftj9zp5y2DrgQCoXxP4LxBQwsU9KAr0-5Hp0bfFlkkkAD2eHwiK_aLonVM97ljsw6NOprGQsOhrkbXDkJIFoP-RMnIKMg0qo7XZys9XUAFjEJdNJLPNgTZPU2hzFCHVx)**

[ **Put Upstate New York First!** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=3a32b479cd664ac4a2e559cd34f6ede6&_e=PzOJrcrAHVgw23E3Ys_K_S_IYCeqJFLSwF5AD0rW6KjgH0asTS4tZOxwVIFAqtZd0dpI3H_nlnNtaebR3xAUeKtzl8_75rbR6WmzO6-kL2ELTn8iZMiIjanDpCLjfoHEzqAg8Dz3L7P9vSIH_-2rvRkd_BmX3_ZBRmXHeMNzuWsFTy3UCFva-w7du1GmoYYv0kbWjd_5K0uPkQ2zffjzBZnU0bmuu0FE8XioleYzo0A1M5sg3_XmdSpSfTyXHPfmelEpHJLmHgiX1UJXjOG-a52Bj6gIitByiSz2_sKUGy885sDAZ2PVDdq6IfGXTXOinwW3FXhpB6JLbTi80PlM2-E97MFG2JD6WWu6hknemssn9vF4NsZBlOiOHFIIbtxhgKyeSEjAnpOIPxgshQPCkjJegPbKCE6NKCA_rYKQHXAcMNA5-cdh0uu_DrP_TK2y_HK5Ir3D48rjzU4bFpcOM1U-1dQYFEViNB5OHMgxcaJDvd7paHb-YUTF5Xg2mRBF)
I was born and raised in New Hartford. My mom ran the family business and my dad was a judge – all while juggling five kids. From a young age, we learned to look out for one another, stand up for the underdog, and stand tall for ourselves.

I became a single mom when my son Trey was young. It was hard to help with homework and baseball practice while trying to manage a business, but we made it work.

Today, Trey serves our country as a Captain in the Marine Corps. I’m so proud of his decision, and now have a better understanding of the sacrifices of our men and women in uniform.

_This community taught him everything he knows about service, and it’s taught me about hard work. That’s why I’m fighting so hard to put our community first again._

**That’s why I want to represent New York’s 22nd Congressional District in Congress.[Join my fight to put Upstate New York first >>>](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=3a32b479cd664ac4a2e559cd34f6ede6&_e=PzOJrcrAHVgw23E3Ys_K_S_IYCeqJFLSwF5AD0rW6KjgH0asTS4tZOxwVIFAqtZd0dpI3H_nlnNtaebR3xAUeKtzl8_75rbR6WmzO6-kL2ELTn8iZMiIjanDpCLjfoHEzqAg8Dz3L7P9vSIH_-2rvRkd_BmX3_ZBRmXHeMNzuWsFTy3UCFva-w7du1GmoYYv0kbWjd_5K0uPkQ2zffjzBZnU0bmuu0FE8XioleYzo0A1M5sg3_XmdSpSfTyXHPfmelEpHJLmHgiX1UJXjOG-a52Bj6gIitByiSz2_sKUGy8V4Iog4EAsTs4ET3hPlToK4p8cLuTL_vh1BSiFEmaoed7hojemKHSMxFFBPbWRwTF0KzymVCfI2l5owhucu2V3DGiZxEoKfaf1osbLFH3BW2xwiwYvorMw8ucMjG7rgOUh-VJrbAYYOo3GyB1PmbLK4HJpXEgHpsWymtOSDEiQlx9AjMlmH7eM2bbhjphgnb_mcVDkTGgqYuebVsYQl_4F)**

When I was in Congress, my only priority was delivering results for the people of Upstate New York. I worked with President Trump to secure funding for our military assets, reduce burdensome regulations, and pass historic tax reform.

_During his time in Congress, Anthony Brindisi has delivered nothing for us. He’s been too busy pandering to the D.C. elite and working with Nancy Pelosi to take down President Trump._

Enough is enough, Peter. **[Help me put Upstate New York first and bring back jobs to the hardworking people of our community! Join my fight>>>](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=3a32b479cd664ac4a2e559cd34f6ede6&_e=PzOJrcrAHVgw23E3Ys_K_S_IYCeqJFLSwF5AD0rW6KjgH0asTS4tZOxwVIFAqtZd0dpI3H_nlnNtaebR3xAUeKtzl8_75rbR6WmzO6-kL2ELTn8iZMiIjanDpCLjfoHEzqAg8Dz3L7P9vSIH_-2rvRkd_BmX3_ZBRmXHeMNzuWsFTy3UCFva-w7du1GmoYYv0kbWjd_5K0uPkQ2zffjzBZnU0bmuu0FE8XioleYzo0A1M5sg3_XmdSpSfTyXHPfmelEpHJLmHgiX1UJXjOG-a52Bj6gIitByiSz2_sKUGy_9LxK98RQOhbdA346RYemA_UGgIDBOdm8ssZP9WkbYlcFxGOc3qr_wQmvKqaROCDuKjgVkZoeEkK2EukCyzvGVo9M_dMLt25Hz_lTCvC06-QGq38G3Y8JoBvSpuBL_NvB9ae20BR8d4OWqc8B3NoHYhHQq_e8AXIhTRkGCix2_NU1k197rjkEqfOFxL38ubGiqxVatixwfXfe42FqygErJ)**
[ **Put Upstate New York First!** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=3a32b479cd664ac4a2e559cd34f6ede6&_e=PzOJrcrAHVgw23E3Ys_K_S_IYCeqJFLSwF5AD0rW6KjgH0asTS4tZOxwVIFAqtZd0dpI3H_nlnNtaebR3xAUeKtzl8_75rbR6WmzO6-kL2ELTn8iZMiIjanDpCLjfoHEzqAg8Dz3L7P9vSIH_-2rvRkd_BmX3_ZBRmXHeMNzuWsFTy3UCFva-w7du1GmoYYv0kbWjd_5K0uPkQ2zffjzBZnU0bmuu0FE8XioleYzo0A1M5sg3_XmdSpSfTyXHPfmelEpHJLmHgiX1UJXjOG-a52Bj6gIitByiSz2_sKUGy-3cgWImVIAE1syTyKNv93Bq4x0ddTppZMmkG4Ri8udSRlqgd9Ad14tpHfVsGIzRP1oEVknMBChaWKpJy8PUrPHoeqsBAPyQWko5pe1VOIX_vjoWK5ePGpfVbZI-WYICvFyi3IITnIK05nnY00lBtRdgPsclTkeB4GEZT7kzE2nF8aFiPMdwn2PGmQ1SsIsqM2UPVHAQGeU8EhDJ7asncgp)
Thanks for your support,
Claudia Tenney

body:

# The Worst Kept Secret in Politics
After months of promising that he won't run for US Senate, radical Democrat Governor Steve Bullock announced today that...wait for it....he's running for US Senate.

There's only one problem--Bullock showed his true colors during his embarrassing and unsuccessful campaign for the Presidency.

Bullock is an enemy of the 2nd Amendment. He is a proponent of higher taxes, a socialist takeover of our healthcare, and would vote to remove President Trump from office.

Bullock isn't a moderate as he pretended to be during his campaign for Governor. He showed us that he's just another extreme liberal like Warren and Bernie.

The Democrats think they can turn Montana blue. They will throw money into every single race in the State.

**We need you now!** Help us show that Democrats are not going to take the Senate and they're not going to turn Montana into a socialist State.
**Help us win this race by Donating Now!**

The Democrats think they can turn Montana blue. They will throw money into every single race in the State. We need you now! Help us show that Democrats are not going to take the Senate and they're not going to turn Montana into a socialist State. Help us win this race by Donating Now! | | | "DONATE NOW" | | PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR MONTANA Copyright © 2020 Troy Downing for Montana All rights reserved. name: Charles Booker
subject: A major endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
I’m so excited to announce that our campaign was recently endorsed by Kentuckians for the Commonwealth.
#
I’m so excited to announce that our campaign was recently endorsed by Kentuckians for the Commonwealth’s New Power PAC. KFTC is the biggest grassroots organization in Kentucky, and it’s an honor to be endorsed by them in this race. It gives us a leg up in terms of grassroots momentum as we look towards the upcoming primary, and a major vote of confidence in our ability to oust Mitch McConnell in November.
**So far, we’ve got endorsements from:**
✅Sunrise Movement
✅Kentuckians for the Commonwealth
✅Action PAC
✅and Collective PAC + others
**Now, can I once again ask for**** _your_****official endorsement?**
[**Sign your name on our page to add yourself to our official endorsers. We need everyone receiving this email to take this action now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15905394/168354402/-1676646822?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTU3MzUxYS01YjYyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=czjEcbSgDL57TtJ-Nzkex_FGSyBWay7gDnjBfHUTSTM=&emci=3db17523-5762-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&emdi=6557351a-5b62-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&ceid=2635570)

Mitch McConnell isn’t going to go easy. We’re going to need ALL of you. We’re going to need your friends, your families, and your neighbors.
In fact, if you can, forward this email to everyone you know in Kentucky now. Ask them to check us out, read our agenda, then add their endorsement too.
[**Sign your name here to endorse our run -- even if you’ve already taken action before with our campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15905397/168354411/-1676646822?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTU3MzUxYS01YjYyLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=czjEcbSgDL57TtJ-Nzkex_FGSyBWay7gDnjBfHUTSTM=&emci=3db17523-5762-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&emdi=6557351a-5b62-ea11-a94c-00155d03b5dd&ceid=2635570)
KFTC’s endorsement is a game changer. I’m fired up and ready to win this thing. Thank you for allowing me to fight this fight with you.
Charles Booker

subject: Some politicians are just concerned with amplifying the voices of the few. Not our campaign; we're bringing every voice in.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639007e/55b66746/230631b0/80e3c6a/682055475/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")

| | On Saturday we opened our first office in Western Mass. Why? **At the start of this campaign Joe made a simple, but important promise: He will show up. ** Western Mass matters. While some politicians are concerned with only amplifying the voices of the few in select areas - we know that we need to bring every voice, every person, every region of this state back into the process to win this primary and build something better for Massachusetts. [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639007e/55b66746/230631b0/80e3c6b/682055475/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2020-03-09-springfield&recurring=1&amount=") That is why this Springfield office in Western Mass is so important. It will serve as a hub for folks to gather, to organize, and to build a community around a common goal of a better future for us all. In fact, Joe will be back in Western Mass this weekend, and the week after that -_because showing up matters. _ _-_ Team Kennedy **If you can, consider pitching in a few dollars to ensure we have the resources to show up for every person across this state. name: John Coady, MJ for Texas
subject: Cornyn's dirty laundry
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
I don't know about you, Peter, but when I think of the ways Senator Cornyn has sold us out, it makes me angry.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890262/7f51f7bc/4c555e72/4ef18dc1/3550183180/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | I don't know about you, Peter, but when I think of the ways Senator Cornyn has sold us out, **it makes me angry**.

I'm asking you to donate to MJ's campaign because she will fight for us, not the special interests. **[Your donation helps build the winning campaign that we'll need to beat Sen. Cornyn this November.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890262/7f51f7bc/4c555e72/4ef18dc0/3550183180/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwNDYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200309.1nd__1046__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

While Sen. Cornyn says he cares about health care, protecting people with pre-existing conditions, and lowering drug costs, the facts tell us all he cares about are his special interest donors:
* **Selling Out Texans to Big Pharma** \-- Sen. Cornyn took over $1.3 million from the pharmaceutical industry and voted to gut a bipartisan effort to rein in prescription drug costs for older Texans.
* **Selling Out Texans With Pre-Existing Conditions** \-- Sen. Cornyn voted 20 times to repeal the Affordable Care Act -- _Politico_ even called him "repeal's top salesman."
* **Selling Out Texas Women** \-- Sen. Cornyn refused to support the bipartisan Violence Against Women Act (VAWA), leading the effort to block the bill that passed the House with the help of six Texas Republicans.

MJ's a working mother who went through two difficult pregnancies. She knows what it's like for working families to have their financial security threatened by medical bills. **[Donate to help put a woman who understands the struggles Texas families deal with in Sen. Cornyn's seat >>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890262/7f51f7bc/4c555e72/4ef18dc0/3550183180/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwNDYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200309.1nd__1046__&amount=10&recurring=true")** [**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890262/7f51f7bc/4c555e72/4ef18dc0/3550183180/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwNDYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200309.1nd__1046__&amount=10&recurring=true")
* **Selling Out Texas Taxpayers** \-- Sen. Cornyn negotiated the tax scam that lined the pockets of his corporate donors, including companies that then laid off hundreds of Texas workers and rewarded themselves with stock buybacks.
* **Selling Out Texas ' Military Families** \-- Sen. Cornyn supports Mitch McConnell's plan to fund a border wall by stealing from military projects on Texas bases and at job-sustaining manufacturing plants.

**We need someone in office who will fight for TEXANS, not for special interests or corporate PAC donors! [Your donation will help MJ clear Sen. Cornyn's corruption OUT of Washington and put Texas values back where they belong.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890262/7f51f7bc/4c555e72/4ef18dc0/3550183180/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwNDYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200309.1nd__1046__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

John Coady
Deputy Campaign Manager
MJ for Texas

[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890262/7f51f7bc/4c555e72/4ef18dc0/3550183180/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjEwNDYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200309.1nd__1046__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---

|
---

MJ for Texas

Round Rock, TX 78683

Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible.

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Montana!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Good news, folks! **My friend and Governor of Montana, Steve Bullock, just announced his campaign for U.S. Senate. Now, Democrats have a stronger chance than ever to take back the majority from Mitch McConnell and the GOP.** Despite Trump winning Montana by more than 20 points in 2016, Steve won his race for governor. I know he can win again -- this time, for Senate -- but only with your help: **The Senate majority is within our grasp, but we have to fight for it. Will you rush a donation to help Steve build a winning campaign to flip Montana 's Senate seat blue and take back the majority for Democrats?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200309-bullock?refcode=em-200309-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
[CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200309-bullock?refcode=em-200309-full&amount=25&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

[CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200309-bullock?refcode=em-200309-full&amount=100&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
| [CHIP IN $250 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200309-bullock?refcode=em-200309-full&amount=250&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200309-bullock?refcode=em-200309-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
Democrats are surging into the lead in battleground races across the country. Just like our race in Colorado, Steve's race in Montana is expected to be one of the best chances Democrats have to flip a Republican seat.
But don't be fooled -- Washington Republicans are running scared and doing whatever it takes to keep their ironclad grip on the majority. Both Steve and I will face an avalanche of outside money from the GOP attack machine.
That's where I'm hoping you can help:
**Will you split a donation between Steve 's campaign and ours to help us build the resources we need to win our competitive elections and take back the majority for Democrats?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200309-bullock?refcode=em-200309-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

| [CHIP IN $250 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200309-bullock?refcode=em-200309-full&amount=250&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200309-bullock?refcode=em-200309-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
I know Steve will be an excellent Senator for Montana. As governor, he expanded Medicaid, fought against dark money, protected reproductive rights, and more.
It would be an honor to serve with him in the U.S. Senate. But we both need your help to get us there. That's why your donation is so important today.
Thank you,
John

Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado

name: Pierce Bush
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pierce Bush for Congress
body:
It was an absolute honor running for the United States Congress in the 22nd
District of Texas! The result was not what we wanted, but the experience of
standing up for ideas and values that make our country so unique and special is
always worth the fight, and I will forever be glad I decided to run.

My favorite part about the whole journey was the volunteers and friends who
stepped up to help us by blockwalking, making calls, donating to our effort,
standing at polls, putting up signs or hosting a meet and greet. It was
inspiring to see old friends help out and meet new friends who stepped up to
the plate for our campaign and Sarahbeth and I feel like we made lifelong
friends during this campaign who we will always treasure.

We move forward knowing that our campaign was never about us, instead it was
about how we can empower people to live lives to their full, God-given
potential by putting people above the government.

Thank you to the 11,258 people who trusted me and our effort with your vote!
We learned a lot and I will certainly do everything I can do to help the
Republican nominee win this seat and stand for conservative values that ensure
our country is a place where freedom and liberty works!

Sincerely,

Pierce Bush

Paid for by Pierce Bush for Congress

Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Pierce Bush for Congress
