name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: White House statement: President Trump takes action on healthcare
body:
Earlier today, President Trump took another groundbreaking action to put American patients back in charge of their healthcare. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=afe4d487a2&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • March 9, 2020
---
| | |
# **White House statement: President Trump takes action on healthcare**

**Earlier today,** President Trump took another groundbreaking action to put American patients back in charge of their healthcare. The new rule will require ALL healthcare systems to provide Americans secure access and control of their own health records.

**Press Secretary Stephanie Grisham** released a statement, which reads in part:
_Patients will be empowered to share their record with family members and care providers and more easily choose the doctor and treatment that is right for them. No longer will Americans spend hundreds of dollars on redundant medical tests or countless hours collecting copies of their medical record, which are often still transferred using a fax machine or CD-ROM. Americans will finally be able to control their health record._

_. . . The Obama/Biden Administration spent $36 billion of stimulus dollars to achieve widespread use of Electronic Health Records, yet Americans are still largely unable to access their full health record more than a decade later. President Trump is correcting this problem and building an American healthcare system where patients are in charge._
[Read Press Secretary Grisham’s full statement.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5d44b026ce&e=3ee4985eea)

**MORE:** [Access to medical records can be the difference between life and death](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a2d26560c7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Coronavirus update: A whole-of-America approach**

**Protecting American communities** from the global Coronavirus outbreak remains the top priority for President Trump and his Administration.

**Vice President Mike Penc** e and the White House Coronavirus Task Force have been tapped by President Trump to lead the federal response. Over the weekend, the Vice President held a briefing with cruise industry leaders in Ft. Lauderdale, joined by Acting Homeland Security Secretary Chad Wolf and CDC Director Dr. Robert Redfield.

🎬 [Watch VP Pence hold briefing with cruise ship executives](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e44ac316e2&e=3ee4985eea)

**“As evidenced** here today, it’s not just the whole-of-government approach, bringing the full resources of the federal government; it’s really a whole-of-America approach,” Vice President Pence said.

**On Friday** , President Trump signed an $8.3 billion funding bill to combat Coronavirus, support local responders, and defend the health and safety of the American people.

[WATCH LIVE at 5:30 p.m. ET: White House Coronavirus Task Force briefing](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=47e2bbe3b2&e=3ee4985eea)

**Press Secretary Grisham:** [Now is not the time for partisan politics](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d0b27e131c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Video of the day: First Lady honors women of courage! **
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fb4da6dbfd&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **First Lady Melania Trump** took part in a ceremony last week to honor the winners of the 2020 International Women of Courage Awards.

**Each year** , the State Department recognizes women around the globe who advocate for peace, human rights, and women’s empowerment. The recipients often pursue these causes despite great personal risk. This year’s 12 honorees were no exception.

**“In my fourth year** attending this ceremony, I continue to be inspired by the personal stories that accompany each of these extraordinary women,” the First Lady said.
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump, joined by Health & Human Services Secretary Alex Azar, signs Coronavirus preparedness & response supplemental appropriations **| March 6, 2020
---
|

name: Laura Loomer
subject: How one woman can change the world . . .
body:
Tonight, Jews across the world begin a celebration called Purim.
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-367294-861739-4902870-c7e3c94689-76e009153a)
Patriot,

Tonight, Jews across the world begin a celebration called Purim.

Purim is a holiday in which we share and show compassion for the poor, celebrate our lives and celebrate our community.

We give gifts to two people who are less fortunate or struggling at this point in their lives; provide two types of food to a friend; and close the celebration with a Thanksgiving-like feast.

Purim comes from a much more serious story as most holidays start.

In the Fourth Century, a Persian king’s advisor came up with a plan to kill all of the Jews in their kingdom.

The plan was approved by the king and a date was set for the extermination to begin.

The Jews, with little hope for survival, prepared with prayer, fasting and repentance.

But the king’s new bride, Esther, also prepared and invited her husband and king to a feast of her own where she revealed that she was actually a Jew herself.

Esther appealed to her king’s heart at great risk to herself as Esther would be one of the many Jews executed if she had not softened her king’s heart.

Esther’s bravery worked and the king reversed the order of his advisor and issued a new decree giving Jews a right to defend themselves from all enemies!

While our history is filled with stories of men showing bravery and strength to save the helpless, Purim is an example of the equal footing of courageous women and our ability to change the world – long before the radical feminist movement demanded it.

One quote in particular from the Book of Esther has motivated me to never stop fighting for what I believe in: “Perhaps this is the moment for which you have been created” Esther 4:14.

Compassion is universal and conservative values support – despite the cries of the Left – helping those in need without being forced to do so and even at risk to ourselves.

If you’re able, join me over the next few days and take part in one aspect of Purim and help out two less fortunate people in any way that you can.

Thank you again for all that you do, and Happy Purim!

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-367294-861739-84585d41bbe610b-76e009153a)

**NEW PPP POLL: Democrats lead by at least 4 in 4 GOP held Senate seats**
Team,
**This is huge: Public Policy Polling just released a new poll that shows Democrats are leading Republican incumbents in _four crucial Senate races_ by four points or more!**
We need to flip at least four GOP seats this November to build our Democratic majority -- and if we stand together, we can do just that in Maine, Arizona, North Carolina, and Colorado.
**[We need to keep up this momentum if we're going to take back the Senate. Pitch in $5 now to support the Democratic candidates in these four key Senate races.](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200308-four-point-races?refcode=em200309i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
**You've got to see these latest poll numbers:**
In Maine, Democrat Sara Gideon is leading her Republican opponent by 47-43.
In Arizona, Democrat Mark Kelly is leading his Republican opponent by 47-42.
In North Carolina, Democrat Cal Cunningham is leading his Republican opponent by 46-41.
And in Colorado, Democrat John Hickenlooper is leading his Republican opponent by 51-38.
This means that **Democrats are leading by four points or more in four states that we MUST win** this November to take back control of the Senate from Mitch McConnell and the GOP.
**[Patty Murray is supporting Sara, Mark, Cal, and John as part of her Sprint to 2020 program. body:
| [](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4e2a/4bd7760e/5806fed5/77ac2ed7/3627934929/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/deforestation-climate-crisis?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200308_3MO-3M5XAT_1M1XAT-1MNTL-1MO-1MC-1M5XAT-1M10xAT_STD_10_deforestation&source=314_EM_PT_200308_3MO-3M5XAT_1M1XAT-1MNTL-1MO-1MC-1M5XAT-1M10xAT_STD_10_deforestation&refcode=314_EM_PT_200308_3MO-3M5XAT_1M1XAT-1MNTL-1MO-1MC-1M5XAT-1M10xAT_STD_10_deforestation")

There's no denying it: we're in the midst of a global crisis, one that's rapidly changing the climate and accelerating extinction rates.

The world's forests are now taking in 1⁄3 less carbon than they did in the 1990s. If this continues, we are rapidly headed toward irreversible climate tipping points.

**Greta Thunberg is right: this alarming news should be on front pages across the world.**

[If you agree with Greta, click here to automatically add your name to our petition demanding that the global media covers this crisis like an actual crisis.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4e2a/4bd7760e/5806fed5/77ac2ed6/3627934929/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZQVGtWZlEweEpRMHRmVTBsSFRsVlFYMVZTVEZ0emJIVm5QV1JsWm05eVpYTjBZWFJwYjI0dFkyeHBiV0YwWlMxamNtbHphWE5kSlNVPSI6InBhZ2Uvb2NzL2RlZm9yZXN0YXRpb24tY2xpbWF0ZS1jcmlzaXMvZ2w1Z2hxIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "http://secure.314action.org/page/ocs/deforestation-climate-crisis/gl5ghq?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+If+you+agree+with+Greta+click+here+to+au&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200308_3MO-3M5XAT_1M1XAT-1MNTL-1MO-1MC-1M5XAT-1M10xAT_STD_10_deforestation&source=314_EM_PT_200308_3MO-3M5XAT_1M1XAT-1MNTL-1MO-1MC-1M5XAT-1M10xAT_STD_10_deforestation&refcode=314_EM_PT_200308_3MO-3M5XAT_1M1XAT-1MNTL-1MO-1MC-1M5XAT-1M10xAT_STD_10_deforestation")
| | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4e2a/4bd7760e/5806fed5/77ac2ed5/3627934929/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/deforestation-climate-crisis?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200308_3MO-3M5XAT_1M1XAT-1MNTL-1MO-1MC-1M5XAT-1M10xAT_STD_10_deforestation&source=314_EM_PT_200308_3MO-3M5XAT_1M1XAT-1MNTL-1MO-1MC-1M5XAT-1M10xAT_STD_10_deforestation&refcode=314_EM_PT_200308_3MO-3M5XAT_1M1XAT-1MNTL-1MO-1MC-1M5XAT-1M10xAT_STD_10_deforestation")
---
Our global climate system is destabilizing while "leaders" like Donald Trump and Brazil's Jair Bolsonaro accelerate the process by propping up polluters and destroying forests.

We can still prevent catastrophic climate change, but the window to act is closing by the second. Our leaders and the media need to hear our message loud and clear: **ACT NOW.**

[We've got to keep up the pressure. clean_body: | "" There's no denying it: we're in the midst of a global crisis, one that's rapidly changing the climate and accelerating extinction rates. The world's forests are now taking in 1⁄3 less carbon than they did in the 1990s. If this continues, we are rapidly headed toward irreversible climate tipping points. Greta Thunberg is right: this alarming news should be on front pages across the world. "" | | "" Our global climate system is destabilizing while "leaders" like Donald Trump and Brazil's Jair Bolsonaro accelerate the process by propping up polluters and destroying forests. name: Terry Neese
subject: They HATE Our Values
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Neese for Congress [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Friend, Like many Oklahomans, I look to God in times of need and trust Him to protect my family. Vice President Mike Pence is a man of strong faith and understands the power of prayer. **He even gathered with the Coronavirus taskforce to pray for God 's help in fighting the epidemic. ** **This moment has the power to bring all Americans together, and yet the radical left is viciously mocking it.** One writer for New York Magazine said: "Mike Pence and his coronavirus emergency team praying for a solution. We are so screwed." Another for Playboy magazine tweeted: "Clear that @vp and @realdonaldtrump are in over their heads. POTUS is literally praying for a miracle to make coronavirus go away". Here's a newsflash for the mainstream media: **There is nothing cowardly or foolish about trusting in our God to protect us.** **Each night I pray for our country 's safety, and I will never give in to the bullies on the left who mock our values.** We must never be afraid to practice our faith in public, no matter what anyone says. In Congress, I will stand with President Trump and Vice President Pence to fight for our values and beliefs. And yes, I will continue praying to God and seeking His providence in times of need.**[But if I'm going to successfully stand up to the radical left, I need your help.](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/892a2gqSH6XO9TCVSz07tSKA/tjoLr9PFlEY5gPCG892neIhg)** [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/892a2gqSH6XO9TCVSz07tSKA/tjoLr9PFlEY5gPCG892neIhg) [**Can we count on you to help us fight for our shared values by donating $10, $20, or even more today?**](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/892a2gqSH6XO9TCVSz07tSKA/tjoLr9PFlEY5gPCG892neIhg) I will never back down from speaking the truth and I'm hoping you will join me today. name: Mark Warner for Senate
subject: Two more years of GOP control...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
The road to a Democratic Senate runs through many key swing states, but it starts here in Virginia.
|
---
| | | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d5ba/53d9897e/53390018/1c898ece/2499148731/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUwNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-nored?refcode=20200309_f_1_nd__506__&refcode2=graphic&amount=5")
---
Derek, if we don't retake the Senate this November, we'll be facing two more years of Mitch McConnell looming over the country as Senate majority leader. **_Nothing will get done._**

The road to a Democratic Senate runs through many key swing states, but it starts here in Virginia. **[Will you pitch in toward Mark's re-election campaign?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d5ba/53d9897e/53390018/1c898ecd/2499148731/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUwNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-nored?refcode=20200309_f_1_nd__506__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Mitch McConnell as majority leader means we won't see any movement on the issues that Virginians care deeply about: **securing our elections, improving access to health care, and lowering prescription drug prices.**

There are (quite literally) hundreds of bipartisan bills gathering dust in McConnell's legislative graveyard, and if we give him two more years, that stack will only get bigger.

We've already made progress in Virginia -- it's time to move forward in Washington, too. We on Team Warner refuse to accept two more years of gridlock. That's why we're committed to retaking the Senate come November.

**Make a donation today to support Mark and set us on the path to a Democratic Senate.**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: The road to a Democratic Senate runs through many key swing states, but it starts here in Virginia. | | | | "" Derek, if we don't retake the Senate this November, we'll be facing two more years of Mitch McConnell looming over the country as Senate majority leader. Nothing will get done. The road to a Democratic Senate runs through many key swing states, but it starts here in Virginia. "" Mitch McConnell as majority leader means we won't see any movement on the issues that Virginians care deeply about: securing our elections, improving access to health care, and lowering prescription drug prices. There are (quite literally) hundreds of bipartisan bills gathering dust in McConnell's legislative graveyard, and if we give him two more years, that stack will only get bigger. We've already made progress in Virginia -- it's time to move forward in Washington, too. We on Team Warner refuse to accept two more years of gridlock. That's why we're committed to retaking the Senate come November. Make a donation today to support Mark and set us on the path to a Democratic Senate. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" "" -- Team Warner | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 "" | | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Marshall Cohen
subject: [Official Focus Group] You’ve been selected
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
| | |
---
| | **[_Action Alert: After huge shakeups in the presidential primary, we need YOUR input immediately >> You've been selected to participate in our Official Democratic Focus Group._](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MTcwNjU4NjUS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTg0MDYwMjY5NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

---
Nobody expected the results from Super Tuesday, Team - almost overnight, the field of candidates is now down to two frontrunners: Joe Biden and Bernie Sanders.
This massive turning point in the Democratic primary election can't be understated. Democrats now have to quickly choose who they want to take on President Trump before it's too late.
**With so much on the line in 2020, we 're reaching out to grassroots Democrats to see where they stand on the presidential election so we can build the best strategy to beat Trump.**
**Our data team says we need 35 more survey responses from FL so we can reach statistical significance, and we 're counting on your response before midnight:**
**[_Please, click here before midnight to enter our Official Democratic Primary Focus Group >>_](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MTcwNjU4NjUS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTg0MDYwMjY5NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

name: Team Hick
subject: Five days before Trump lands in Colorado
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Folks: Trump and Washington Republicans are doing everything they can to save their favorite Senator, Cory Gardner, and beat us in November. **In just five days, Trump will fly out to Colorado and host yet another lavish fundraiser for Gardner. And get this -- a table for two and a picture with Trump costs _$100,000_. Talk about big spenders!** Look, we're not depending on six-figure checks and corporate PACs and trust us, John likes it that way. We'd rather build a winning campaign you can be proud of -- one fueled by everyday people chipping in what they can to make a difference. **But we absolutely cannot let Colorado be sold to the highest bidder.** So, we're preparing for Trump's visit the right way -- by raising $250,000 through small-dollar donations from folks like you. **Will you donate $10 or more right now to help us raise the funds we need before Trump lands in Colorado? We 're confident that if enough people step up, we can overcome the GOP's big-money attacks.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200309-invite?refcode=em-200309-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

name: Reverend Warnock
subject: re: Stacey's endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Did you see this?
| |
---
Friend,

Did you see that Stacey Abrams just endorsed our campaign for U.S. Senate in Georgia? I am proud to call her an ally in our fight to restore moral leadership to Washington - and so grateful to have her support.
**Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight reports Democrats CAN flip the Senate - but winning in Georgia is the key. I'm already being outspent by my Republican opponent, who is flooding this race with tens of millions of her own personal fortune ****- ****so I need immediate grassroots support from people like you to fight back.**
[**Please, friend: Will you read Stacey's note below, then chip in $5 or more right now to help us flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats? Every single dollar makes a difference.**](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk104-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")

Thanks for pitching in. I really appreciate it.

Reverend Warnock
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Stacey Abrams
Subject: My endorsement (Georgia Senate announcement)
| |
---
Friends,

In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make a donation to Reverend Raphael Warnock's campaign for U.S. Senate in Georgia.**But first, let me explain why I am proud to endorse him and why your early support is so critical.**
In 2018, we built a diverse coalition of hardworking folks from all over Georgia, especially Georgians from marginalized communities who felt unseen and unheard. Our fight was rooted in the belief that poverty is immoral, that Georgians deserve access to affordable health care and that the economy ought to work for everyone.
The fact is, people in the White House and the U.S. Senate are failing Georgians of every political party, every race and every region.
The Republican Party's divisive agenda - and systematic voter suppression - goes against everything we stand for as Americans. But here's what gives me hope: All around the country, good people - including many folks who have never been involved with politics before - are stepping up to fight back and defend American values. We have the grassroots energy we need to restore this nation's democracy - and if we all do our part in 2020 to elect leaders who share these values, I know we can make our vision for the country a reality.
That's why I am so excited Reverend Raphael Warnock, a champion for Georgians in the fight for justice, just announced he is running for U.S. Senate. Reverend Warnock is a strong leader, a pastor, and an advocate - and he would be the first black senator our state has _ever_ elected. **[_If you are as ready as I am to support Reverend Warnock 's campaign, please give $5 or more right now to become a Founding Donor so we can flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats in 2020. _](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk104-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**
Reverend Warnock knows the incredible movement we built in Georgia in 2018, and he's determined to build the energy we need all the way to the ballot box in November. He's ready to fight voter suppression, ensure that health care is protected and expanded and break barriers to opportunity so that future generations know that the sky is the limit.
For the past fifteen years, I have watched Reverend Warnock lead on issues of social justice, economic access and voting rights. We stood shoulder to shoulder on the toughest fights, against opponents who used their power to belittle and erase their fellow Georgians. He's dedicated his life to public service, and I know _without a doubt_ that he will be a strong advocate for folks in every corner of our state.
**But if we are going to build momentum and flip Georgia blue in 2020, we need to show Reverend Warnock - and a Republican Party that thinks they can steal this seat by spending millions of dollars and suppressing the vote - that we have a grassroots movement strong enough to _win._ That is why I need supporters like YOU to help us get this campaign off the ground. **
**[_So please, friends, will you give $5 now - as much as you can spare - to help Reverend Warnock win this Senate seat, flip Georgia blue and ensure our constitutional rights are protected in the years to come? _](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk104-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**
Thank you for your support.

Stacey Abrams
| | [Contribute](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk104-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e6ea/288179be/a9eb59a/348ee263/122065375/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | | (C) 2020 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia.
Title and affiliation are provided for identification purposes only.
PO Box 991 Decatur, GA 30031

Reverend Warnock is a strong leader, a pastor, and an advocate - and he would be the first black senator our state has ever elected. "" Reverend Warnock knows the incredible movement we built in Georgia in 2018, and he's determined to build the energy we need all the way to the ballot box in November. He's ready to fight voter suppression, ensure that health care is protected and expanded and break barriers to opportunity so that future generations know that the sky is the limit. For the past fifteen years, I have watched Reverend Warnock lead on issues of social justice, economic access and voting rights. We stood shoulder to shoulder on the toughest fights, against opponents who used their power to belittle and erase their fellow Georgians. He's dedicated his life to public service, and I know without a doubt that he will be a strong advocate for folks in every corner of our state. But if we are going to build momentum and flip Georgia blue in 2020, we need to show Reverend Warnock - and a Republican Party that thinks they can steal this seat by spending millions of dollars and suppressing the vote - that we have a grassroots movement strong enough to win.
